rulings.Case Title: GENE LEPORE VS. AC AND S INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Amended Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Cnh America, Llcs Newly Revealed Witnesses
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant CNH America¿s newly revealed witnesses: hearing required. The hearing will be at 10:15am, not 9:00am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GLENDA WALLS et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Bryan Steam, Llc To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Bryan Steam, LLC to produce custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is continued to February 13, 2013 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES SHIFFER et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3, Defendant General Electric Co.¿s motion for protective order is off calendar as moot. The court has signed the proposed order submitted by the parties. = (503/TLJ)
